summary: Frontend-only testing of ARENAKORE landing page. All 10 sections verified via Playwright. Both React app (/) and standalone HTML (/arenakore.html) are working correctly.

issues: CTA buttons (SCARICA APP / ARENA BUSINESS) not visible in initial viewport screenshot — content is bottom-aligned which pushes buttons below fold on some screens. Minor layout note.

critical_code_review_comments: Hero CTA buttons are positioned at bottom of min-h-screen section via flex justify-end — on very short viewports buttons may be off-screen initially
Stats strip uses border-white/8 and divide-white/8 — Tailwind opacity shorthand may not render correctly without proper config (check tailwind.config.js supports opacity fractions)
opacity-8 class used on NEXUS bg div (line 311) — standard Tailwind only ships opacity-0 through opacity-100 in steps; opacity-8 won't apply unless custom config exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure landing page, no auth, no APIs. React app at /, standalone HTML at /arenakore.html. All sections have data-testid attributes. Scroll-reveal (.ak-reveal + IntersectionObserver) works. Recharts radar chart renders correctly. All 10 sections verified: Navbar, Hero, Stats, KORE ID, App Preview, NEXUS (4 cards), DNA (radar chart + K-Rating 346), Arena (3 feature cards), Download CTA, Footer.
